text: Select and set up video generation service (Veo/Runway/Luma)
description:
**HUMAN DECISION + ACTION REQUIRED**

Choose a video generation service for Instagram Reels/TikTok content:

**Option 1: Veo 3.1 (Google)**
- Best for sci-fi aesthetic
- Currently on waitlist
- Join waitlist: https://deepmind.google/technologies/veo/veo-3/
- Free tier available but limited

**Option 2: Runway Gen-3** (RECOMMENDED for immediate start)
- Available now
- $95/month unlimited plan
- Good quality, reliable API
- Sign up: https://runwayml.com/

**Option 3: Luma Dream Machine**
- $29/month (most affordable)
- Lower quality than Runway
- Sign up: https://lumalabs.ai/dream-machine

**After choosing:**
1. Create account and subscribe
2. Generate API key
3. Add credentials to project configuration
4. Test with sample prompt

**After setup:** Aim 12d8696a can proceed with video generation integration.

status.comment: Waiting for human to select service and set up account
